# Product Surface Matrix

Single metadata surface for SDK, CLI, TypeScript MCP, Go MCP, docs, and gates.

## Source policy

| Surface | Path |
|---|---|
| canonicalOpenApi | `../GOCLMCP/docs/openapi/clockify-openapi.yaml` |
| localSnapshot | `spec/corrected/clockify.corrected.openapi.yaml` |
| generatedCore | `output/ts-sdk` |
| handwrittenSdkLayer | `wrapper/*.ts` |
| generatedEditRule | `Do not hand-edit spec/corrected, output/ts-sdk, or wrapper/src.` |

## Workflow parity

| Workflow | User goal | SDK | CLI | TS MCP | Go MCP | Availability | Proof mode | Recovery | Intentional gaps | Proof |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| status | Confirm authentication, workspace, user, and running timer state. | createClockifyClient<br>clockifyDiagnostics<br>client.health<br>client.workspaces<br>client.timeEntries | clockify115 status<br>clk115 status<br>clk115 doctor | clockify_status<br>clockify://mcp/doctor | clockify_status | sdk: supported through diagnostics, health, workspace, and time-entry APIs<br>cli: supported through status and doctor commands<br>tsMcp: supported through status tool and doctor resource<br>goMcp: supported through status tool | mock/unit plus live sandbox status probes when credentials are present | Use diagnostics request IDs and stable error codes before changing auth or workspace configuration. | - | wrapper/tests/diagnostics.test.ts<br>wrapper/tests/health.test.ts<br>cli/tests<br>mcp/tests |
| first-run-support | Diagnose first-run setup issues and prepare a safe support handoff before mock or live proof. | clockifyDiagnostics<br>docs/quickstart-receipt.md<br>scripts/create-support-bundle.mjs | clk115 doctor<br>clk115 status<br>make diagnostics<br>make support-bundle | clockify://mcp/doctor | clockify://mcp/doctor | sdk: supported through no-network diagnostics and generated support bundle metadata<br>cli: supported through doctor/status plus quickstart and support-bundle gates<br>tsMcp: supported through the doctor resource, not a mutating tool<br>goMcp: supported through the matching doctor resource | no-network diagnostics and support-bundle contracts before mock or live sandbox proof | Use readinessContext, safeCommandHints, and diagnostic receipt output before asking for logs or retrying live calls. | This workflow is diagnostics/support-only; it must not mutate Clockify, publish packages, or use customer workspaces. | docs/quickstart-receipt.md<br>docs/support-bundle-contract.json<br>docs/issue-intake-contract.json<br>docs/acceptance-scenarios.md |
| time-tracking | Start, stop, switch, log, list, update, and delete time entries. | client.timeEntries<br>iterAll<br>iterPages | clk115 start<br>clk115 stop<br>clk115 log<br>clk115 entries list<br>clk115 entries delete | clockify_start_work<br>clockify_stop_work<br>clockify_switch_work<br>clockify_log_work<br>clockify_review_day<br>clockify_review_week<br>clockify_fix_entry | clockify_start_work<br>clockify_stop_work<br>clockify_switch_work<br>clockify_log_work<br>clockify_review_day<br>clockify_review_week<br>clockify_fix_entry | sdk: supported through time-entry resources and pagination helpers<br>cli: supported through first-class start, stop, log, list, and delete commands<br>tsMcp: supported through workflow tools for start, stop, switch, log, review, and fix<br>goMcp: supported through matching workflow tools | unit plus live sandbox create/update/delete flows when credentials are present | Prefer returned entry IDs; after ambiguous writes, re-list by ID or bounded date range before retrying. | - | wrapper/tests/iter.test.ts<br>cli/tests/sandbox.test.ts<br>mcp/tests/sandbox.test.ts |
| work-package | Create or reuse clients, projects, tasks, and tags before logging work. | client.clients<br>client.projects<br>client.tasks<br>client.tags | clk115 clients list<br>clk115 clients create<br>clk115 projects list<br>clk115 projects create<br>clk115 tasks list<br>clk115 tags list<br>clk115 tags create | clockify_create_work_package<br>clockify_clients_*<br>clockify_projects_*<br>clockify_tasks_*<br>clockify_tags_* | clockify_create_work_package<br>clockify_clients_*<br>clockify_projects_*<br>clockify_tasks_*<br>clockify_tags_* | sdk: supported through client, project, task, and tag resources<br>cli: supported through list/create commands for clients, projects, tasks, and tags<br>tsMcp: supported through create-work-package workflow plus domain tools<br>goMcp: supported through matching workflow and domain tools | resource docs, CLI tests, and MCP workflow tests | Reuse existing objects when receipts report reuse; clean up by explicit IDs or timestamped prefixes. | - | wrapper/docs/resources<br>cli/tests<br>mcp/tests/workflows.test.ts |
| business-workflows | Handle invoices, expenses, time off, scheduling, webhooks, and audit logs safely. | client.invoices<br>client.expenses<br>client.timeOff<br>client.scheduling<br>client.webhooks<br>client.auditLogReport | clk115 invoices list<br>clk115 invoices create<br>clk115 expenses list<br>clk115 timeoff list<br>clk115 timeoff submit<br>clk115 scheduling list<br>clk115 scheduling create<br>clk115 webhooks list<br>clk115 webhooks create<br>clk115 audit-log search | clockify_invoice_client_work<br>clockify_record_expense<br>clockify_request_time_off<br>clockify_schedule_work<br>clockify_setup_webhook | clockify_invoice_client_work<br>clockify_record_expense<br>clockify_request_time_off<br>clockify_schedule_work<br>clockify_setup_webhook | sdk: supported through generated resources plus wrapper recovery helpers<br>cli: supported through list/create/search commands where the CLI exposes the workflow<br>tsMcp: supported through dry-run and confirmation-token workflow tools<br>goMcp: supported through matching workflow tools and raw fallback where documented | contract evidence, sandbox MCP flows, and GOCLMCP parity docs | Use dry_run and confirm_token before high-risk writes; preserve request IDs and discrepancy anchors. | - | spec/evidence/discrepancies.md<br>mcp/tests/sandbox.test.ts<br>../GOCLMCP/docs/api-parity-matrix.md |
| demo-and-cleanup | Seed deterministic demo objects and remove them by prefix after tests or demos. | client.clients<br>client.projects<br>client.tasks<br>client.tags<br>client.timeEntries | - | clockify_demo_seed<br>clockify_demo_cleanup | clockify_demo_seed<br>clockify_demo_cleanup | sdk: supported through underlying resources used by the demo workflow<br>cli: no dedicated demo workflow command; use normal create/list/delete commands in a sacrificial workspace<br>tsMcp: supported through dedicated demo seed and cleanup tools<br>goMcp: supported through matching demo seed and cleanup tools | cleanup script plus live-test documentation for sandbox-only proof | Use identifiable prefixes and cleanup receipts; never run demo cleanup against a customer workspace. | CLI has no dedicated demo seed/cleanup command; this is intentionally an MCP-first workflow. | mcp/scripts/assert-clean-prefixes.mjs<br>../GOCLMCP/docs/live-tests.md |
